title: Better Infinite Trading
description: Make Villagers trade infinite without permanently changing their data.
body:
# Better Infinite Trading
---

Better Infinite Trading (BIT) removes villager trade limits while the mod is installed however unlike other infinite trade mods BIT doesn't do any NBT edits so there is no permanent changes so removing the mod makes everything return to vanilla instantly.

---

## Features

* ♾️ Infinite villager trades (no restock needed)
* 🔄 Fully reversible — safe to remove anytime
* 🧼 No persistent data changes
* ⚡ Lightweight and minimal

---
